category: Essential Internal Components of a Mechanical Clock
explanation: Gear, Pendulum, Mainspring, and Escapement are all crucial internal mechanical components that enable a traditional analog clock to function. A battery is an external power source used in quartz or digital clocks, not an internal mechanism of a purely mechanical timepiece.

category: The Four Great Inventions of Ancient China
explanation: Printing Press, Compass, Gunpowder, and Papermaking are collectively known as the 'Four Great Inventions' of ancient China, which significantly influenced world history. The Steam Engine was a pivotal invention of the Industrial Revolution, originating in the Western world.
The first four words each contain the name of a distinct planet (Mercury, Venus, Saturn, Mars) as a substring. 'NEPTUNE' is itself a planet, not a word containing another planet's name.
